enonce.texte: Complete the following sentences with the correct simple past tense form of the verbs in brackets.

questions.texte: I ______ (play) football with my friends yesterday.
questions.reponse: played

questions.texte: She ______ (visit) her grandmother last weekend.
questions.reponse: visited

questions.texte: We ______ (not / go) to the cinema because we were tired.
questions.reponse: did not go / didn't go

questions.texte: ______ you ______ (enjoy) the concert last night?
questions.reponse: Did you enjoy

questions.texte: He ______ (read) three books during the holidays.
questions.reponse: read

questions.texte: They ______ (have) a wonderful time at the party.
questions.reponse: had

questions.texte: My sister ______ (take) up painting as a hobby last year.
questions.reponse: took

enonce.texte:
Read the following text about health and hobbies and answer the questions below.

My Favourite Hobbies

I have many hobbies that help me stay healthy. My favourite hobby is swimming. I started swimming when I was 10 years old. I swim three times a week at the local pool. Swimming is good for my heart and muscles. I also enjoy cycling. I often go cycling with my friends on weekends. We ride our bikes in the countryside and enjoy the fresh air. Last summer, I participated in a cycling competition and won a medal. Another hobby I like is reading. I read books about health and fitness. Reading helps me relax after a long day. I believe hobbies are important because they keep us active and happy.

questions.texte: What is the writer's favourite hobby?
questions.reponse: The writer's favourite hobby is swimming.

questions.texte: How often does the writer swim?
questions.reponse: The writer swims three times a week.

questions.texte: What happened when the writer participated in a cycling competition?
questions.reponse: The writer won a medal in the cycling competition.

questions.texte: Why does the writer believe hobbies are important?
questions.reponse: The writer believes hobbies are important because they keep us active and happy.

enonce.texte: Write questions in the simple past tense for the following answers.

questions.texte:
Answer: She played tennis last weekend.
Question: ______?
questions.reponse: What did she play last weekend?

questions.texte:
Answer: He visited his grandparents during the holidays.
Question: ______?
questions.reponse: Who did he visit during the holidays?

questions.texte:
Answer: They went to the beach yesterday.
Question: ______?
questions.reponse: Where did they go yesterday?

questions.texte:
Answer: I read a book about health last week.
Question: ______?
questions.reponse: What did you read last week?

enonce.texte:
Write a short paragraph (80-100 words) describing a hobby you enjoy. In your paragraph, include:

  • The name of the hobby
  • When you started it
  • How often you do it
  • Why you enjoy it
  • How it benefits your health
  • Use at least three verbs in the simple past tense

questions.texte: Write the paragraph describing your hobby.
questions.reponse:
My Favourite Hobby

My favourite hobby is playing basketball. I started playing basketball when I was 12 years old. I joined a local team and practised every weekend. Now, I play basketball three times a week after school. I enjoy this hobby because it is fun and energetic. Basketball helps me stay fit and strong. It improves my coordination and makes me feel happy. Last year, I participated in a school tournament and my team won the championship. I love basketball because it keeps me healthy and allows me to make new friends.

enonce.texte:
Create a dialogue (8-10 exchanges) between two friends discussing their hobbies and how these hobbies affect their health. In your dialogue, include:

  • At least four verbs in the simple past tense
  • Mention of specific hobbies
  • How each hobby benefits health

questions.texte: Write the dialogue between the two friends.
questions.reponse:
Marie: Hi Paul! What do you like to do in your free time?

Paul: I love swimming. I started swimming when I was young. I go to the pool every Saturday.

Marie: That sounds great! Is swimming good for your health?

Paul: Yes, it is. It strengthens my muscles and keeps my heart healthy. What about you?

Marie: I enjoy dancing. I took dance lessons last year. I dance three times a week.

Paul: That's wonderful! Dancing is a good way to stay fit.

Marie: Yes, it helps me relax and made me more flexible. I performed in a show last month and it was amazing.

Paul: I think hobbies are important for our health and happiness.

Marie: I agree. We should continue doing what we love!

intitule: Writing a Short Report on Recreational Activities

enonce.texte:
You are the president of the sports club at your school. Write a short report (80-100 words) about the recreational activities that students participated in last term. In your report, include:

  • At least three activities
  • The number of participants
  • The benefits of these activities for students' health
  • Use verbs in the simple past tense

questions.texte: Write the report on recreational activities.
questions.reponse:
Sports Club Report - Last Term

Last term, the school sports club organized many recreational activities. We organized football matches every Friday. About 40 students participated in the matches. We also arranged basketball and volleyball training sessions. These activities helped students improve their physical fitness and teamwork skills. Many students said they felt happier and more energetic. A group of students also started a running club. They ran every morning before classes. These activities reduced stress and improved concentration in class. We plan to continue these activities next term.

enonce.texte: Identify and correct the errors in the following sentences. Each sentence has one error related to the simple past tense.

questions.texte: She go to the gym yesterday morning.
questions.reponse: Corrected: She went to the gym yesterday morning.

questions.texte: I didn't enjoyed the hiking trip because I was tired.
questions.reponse: Corrected: I didn't enjoy the hiking trip because I was tired.

questions.texte: They play tennis every day last week.
questions.reponse: Corrected: They played tennis every day last week.

questions.texte: Did she went to the swimming pool yesterday?
questions.reponse: Corrected: Did she go to the swimming pool yesterday?
